source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
An infinitely long hollow conducting cylinder with inner radius $R/2$ and outer radius $R$ carries a uniform current density along its length. The magnitude of the magnetic field, $|\vec{B}|$ as a function of the radial distance $r$ from the axis is best represented by
<image_1>
extraction_notes: options field contains only option labels, no option text content
answer remains as option label because no corresponding option text is provided
image_1 is present as a PIL.Image object string representation, not a path or URL

issues: Answer is provided only as an option label because no corresponding option text is available.
Structured option text is not provided; metadata notes the options field contains only option labels.
metadata notes image_1 was represented as a PIL.Image object string rather than a path or URL in the source extraction.

image_dependency: question_text asks which graph best represents |B| as a function of radial distance r, so the target answer depends on inspecting graph options
multi_step: solving requires reasoning about the magnetic field in different radial regions of a hollow conducting cylinder (inside cavity, within conductor, outside conductor)
the task then requires mapping that piecewise physical behavior to one of the graphical choices
question_text describes geometric structure with inner radius R/2 and outer radius R, indicating condition-based reasoning rather than direct lookup
verifiability: answer_present=true and answer_type is choice/option, which is a checkable final format
registry_passed=true and an image asset exists, so the selected option can in principle be checked against the provided visual choices
verifiability is reduced because answer_text is only the label 'D' and the structured option text does not contain the actual graph descriptions
